name: simtabi/sis
description: The Simtabi Identifier System — a pure-PHP, zero-dependency functional core: grammar, ISO 7064 check characters, the class register, the lifecycle state machine, alias derivation, and semver releases. The reference implementation of SIM-STD-0001:2026.

suggest.ext-intl: Best-quality alias transliteration (Any-Latin; Latin-ASCII). Without it, and without ext-iconv, transliteration falls back to raw ASCII.
suggest.ext-iconv: Fallback alias transliteration when ext-intl is absent.
